case_title: LAU, BART et al vs. BIMBO, ELY et al

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, BART LAU, JINDARAT P. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-30-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-04-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, BART LAU, JINDARAT P. AS TO DEFENDANT BIMBO, ELY BIMBO, PEGGY DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT BIMBO, ELY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BIMBO, ELY

JURY RM, PRO TEM MICHAEL ROSSOFF, CSR J. LEWIS, CLERK EMONTI 2:30 PM C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, DOUGLAS PITCHFORD. DEFT ELY BIMBO PRESENT IN PRO PER & RE- PRESENTING PEGGY BIMBO. TERMS ARE STATED FOR THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR POSS OF THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 4483 MISSION ST. WRIT OF EXECUTION IS STAYED TO 4-19-94, MIDNIGHT. IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY, PLTF TO WAIVE RENT, ATTY FEES & COSTS. IF DEFTS DO NOT VACATE & LEAVE PREMISES IN CLEAN CONDITION, PLTF TO SEEK JUDGMENT FOR $3000.00 IN BACK RENT, $819.00 ATTY FEES AND $280.00 COSTS. IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY, PLTF TO REFUND HALF OF SEC DEPOSIT ($500.00). NO FURTHER STAYS. LEASE FORFEITED. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIMBO, ELY BIMBO, PEGGY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4483 MISSION ST, SF., STAYED UNTIL APR-19-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION IS STAYED THROUGH MIDNIGHT, 4-19-94. IF DEFTS VA- CATE TIMELY, PLTF TO REFUND $500.00 OF THEIR $1000.00 SEC DEPOSIT. IF DEFTS DO NOT VACATE TIMELY, PLTF TO AMEND JUDG- MENT TO INCLUDE $3000.00 FOR RENT, $819.00 FOR ATTY FEES & $280.00 COSTS & RETAIN SEC DEPOSIT AS A CREDIT. SEE FILE.
